body:
totally-sapphic-posts:

Imagine that girl who hugs you when you’re tired, kisses your forehead when you frown, quietly makes you tea when you’re overwhelmed, and always seems to know how to be there in the ways you need when you need them.

trail.content_raw: Imagine that girl who hugs you when you’re tired, kisses your forehead when you frown, quietly makes you tea when you’re overwhelmed, and always seems to know how to be there in the ways you need when you need them.
trail.content: Imagine that girl who hugs you when you’re tired, kisses your forehead when you frown, quietly makes you tea when you’re overwhelmed, and always seems to know how to be there in the ways you need when you need them.
